```latex
\documentclass[11pt]{article}
\usepackage[margin=1cm]{geometry}
\usepackage{fontspec}
\usepackage{emoji}
\usepackage[dvipsnames]{xcolor}
\usepackage{fancyhdr}
\usepackage{titlesec}
\usepackage{enumitem}
\usepackage{tikz}
\usepackage{afterpage}

\definecolor{accent}{RGB}{25,113,194}
\definecolor{secondary}{RGB}{150,94,238}
\definecolor{highlight}{RGB}{255,127,80}

\setmainfont{Arial}
\newfontfamily\emojifont{Noto Color Emoji}[Renderer=HarfBuzz]

\pagestyle{fancy}
\fancyhf{}
\renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{0pt}
\fancyhead[C]{\color{accent!80}\Large\sffamily\textbf{Performance Strategy Report}\\[-2pt]\rule{\textwidth}{0.5pt}}
\fancyfoot[C]{\footnotesize\sffamily\color{gray}Page \thepage\quad|\quad\textbf{CONFIDENTIAL}}

\titleformat{\section}{\color{accent}\sffamily\large\bfseries}{}{0em}{\llap{\color{secondary}\emojifont\thesection\quad}}[{\titlerule[1pt]}]
\titlespacing*{\section}{0pt}{12pt}{6pt}

\setlist[itemize]{leftmargin=*,nosep,label=\color{secondary}\textbullet}
\newcommand{\platform}[1]{\textcolor{accent}{\texttt{#1}}}
\newcommand{\metric}[1]{\textcolor{highlight}{\textbf{#1}}}
\newcommand{\icon}[1]{{\emojifont\scriptsize#1}}

\begin{document}

\afterpage{\fancyhead[C]{}}
\pagestyle{fancy}

\begin{center}
\emojifont\huge📋\\[-5pt]
\textcolor{accent}{\sffamily\LARGE\textbf{CONFIDENTIAL}}\\[3pt]
\small Analysis period: November 2024–January 2025
\end{center}

\section*{📈 Performance Analytics}
\textbf{Core Metrics (Nov 2024–Jan 2025)}:
\begin{itemize}
\item \platform{Spotify}: \metric{37,977} peak listeners (Nov 2024), stabilizing at \metric{24,778} (+8.1\% MoM recovery)
\item \platform{Last.fm}: \metric{13–20\%} MoM growth (608 → 729 listeners)
\item \platform{Pandora}: No measurable activity \textcolor{red}{\textbf{(urgent action required)}}
\end{itemize}

\textbf{Key Trends}:
\begin{itemize}
\item \metric{15–20\%} post-release streaming declines indicate playlist dependency risk
\item Weekend listening drops (\metric{-8\%} Fri–Sun) align with club/DJ audience behavior
\item Remix tracks outperform originals by \metric{40\%} in saves (112\% spike for ``Dance All Night Remix'')
\end{itemize}

\section*{🌍 Audience Development}
\textbf{Follower Growth}:
\begin{itemize}
item \platform{Instagram}: \metric{4,875} (+22\% since Jul 2024) \icon{📸}
\item \platform{Spotify}: \metric{4,109} (+17\% MoM) \icon{🎧} 5:1 listener-to-follower conversion rate
\end{itemize}

\textbf{Engagement Patterns}:
\begin{itemize}
\item \platform{Instagram}: Mid-afternoon peak engagement \icon{⏰}
\item \platform{Spotify}: Evening listening dominance (8–11 PM local) \icon{🌙}
\item Untapped \platform{YouTube} potential: 3 subscribers vs. 47-track catalog \icon{⚠️}
\end{itemize}

\section*{🎵 Release Impact Analysis}
\textbf{Top Performers}:
\begin{itemize}
\item \platform{"Breathless" (w/L25)}: \metric{83\%} streams from collaborator's audience \icon{✨}
\item \platform{"Butterflies Remix"}: \metric{40\%} higher saves vs. original \icon{🚀}
\end{itemize}

\textbf{Release Timing Insights}:
\begin{itemize}
\item Summer releases (Jun–Jul) sustain \metric{+18\%} longer than fall drops \icon{☀️}
\item Midweek launches (Tue–Wed) drive \metric{23\%} more playlist adds \icon{📅}
\end{itemize}

\section*{📱 Distribution \& Platform Strategy}
\textbf{Platform Report Card}:
\begin{itemize}
\item \platform{Spotify}: Core revenue driver (tier-2 playlists secured) \icon{✅}
\item \platform{TikTok}: Zero presence despite dance-friendly catalog \icon{⚠️}
\item \platform{YouTube}: No official uploads (critical gap) \icon{🚨}
\end{itemize}

\section*{🏆 Market Position Assessment}
\textbf{Growth Vectors}:
\begin{itemize}
\item Target Mexico City/LA warehouse circuits \icon{📍}
\item Netflix sync opportunities for Latin fusion tracks \icon{🎬}
\end{itemize}

\section*{🚀 Action Items}
\textbf{Immediate Wins (0–30d)}:
\begin{itemize}
\item Convert \platform{"Take Off That Noise"} into TikTok challenge series \icon{⚡}
\item Allocate \metric{\$500/mo} → Instagram Reel tutorials \icon{💸}
\end{itemize}

\vspace*{10pt}
\begin{center}
\rule{0.8\textwidth}{0.5pt}\\[-2pt]
\small\sffamily\textcolor{gray}{Document version: 2.1 | Generated: \today}
\end{center}

\end{document}
```
